message:
Fix external dependency parsing, wire up label-any filter, and harden label validation

External dependency parsing:
- Fix split_once(':') incorrectly splitting "external:some-id" into
  type=external, id=some-id. Now treats the whole string as the dep ID
  with type "blocks" when the prefix is "external:".
- Same fix applied in both create.rs and markdown_import.rs for consistency.

Search improvements:
- Wire up --label-any filter which was silently ignored (always set to None)
- Add "created"/"updated" as sort aliases for "created_at"/"updated_at"

Label validation hardening in update.rs:
- Move label validation before any DB writes (fail-fast on invalid labels)
- Use new set_labels() method instead of manual remove-all + add-each
- Add pre-check for parent cycle before remove_parent/add_dependency to
  avoid leaving the issue orphaned on cycle detection error

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
